title: HLM backbone-window attention
summary: Make the chunk-rate HLM tower follow the backbone sliding/full attention schedule instead of always using full causal attention.
hypothesis: The HLM tower can reduce attention cost and align its inductive bias by inheriting the backbone window cadence.
design: Add per-layer sliding-window causal bias support and a full/backbone_window mode, then make backbone_window the default.

delta.summary: Make the chunk-rate HLM tower follow the backbone sliding/full attention schedule instead of always using full causal attention.

operations.rationale: Retain an independently switchable full-attention alternative.

analysis.conclusion: The code and default are pinned, but no isolated quality or throughput result is committed.
limitations: No A/B result establishes the effect of HLM windowing.
The concept-window to token receptive-field mapping needs algorithm-owner confirmation.

evidence.summary: Adds causal sliding-window masks and backbone-window configuration to the HLM tower.
Changes the launcher/model default from full HLM attention to backbone_window.

work-repo.note: Derived private work-repository evidence; never root or official OLMo-3 provenance.

title_zh: HLM 注意力继承骨干窗口节奏
summary_zh: 将 HLM 内部注意力从每层全因果改为继承 OLMo3 骨干的 local/global 交替节奏，包括 window_size 与 window_attn_skip_freq。

validation.comparison: Full-causal HLM attention versus the inherited backbone local/global window cadence.
conditions: No isolated parent-relative result artifact is available.
observations: The code and default are pinned, but no isolated quality or throughput result is committed.
validation.conclusion: The code and default are pinned, but no isolated quality or throughput result is committed.
limitations: No A/B result establishes the effect of HLM windowing.
The concept-window to token receptive-field mapping needs algorithm-owner confirmation.
